zh.lifeSummary: 當Adam Wiatt於1285年出生在英國英格蘭格亞特 曼徹斯特黑格時，他的父親Richard Le Wayte36歲，母親Alice de Neville36歲。他和Agnes Wigton至少有5個兒子。他去世於1355年在英國英格蘭波克夏可爾布盧可享年70歲，埋葬在英國越可爾。

nameMeanings.name: Wiatt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Wyatt
meanings: from the Middle English personal names Wiot or Wiet. These are often pet forms of Wy, from ancient Germanic Wido (see Guy , compare Wyand 1). Wy is the usual Norman French form of the name; the Parisian French form is Guy. Wiot was also used as a diminutive of William . As a surname Wyot(t) became Wyatt during the 16th century.

in Suffolk, this is sometimes a variant of Wyard, from the Middle English personal name Wiard, which is generally from Old English Wīgheard, which is composed of the elements wīg ‘battle’ + heard ‘bold, brave’. Occasionally it may be from Old French Wiard, ancient Germanic Withard (see Viard ).

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Adam Wiatt was born in 1285, in Haigh, Greater Manchester, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Le Wayte, was 36 and his mother, Alice de Neville, was 36. He had at least 5 sons with Agnes Wigton. He died in 1355, in Colnbrook, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 70, and was buried in Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adam Wiatt est né en 1285, à Haigh, Greater Manchester, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Le Wayte, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Alice de Neville, avait 36 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils avec Agnes Wigton. Il est décédé en 1355, à Colnbrook, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Everwyck, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Adam Wiattが1285年にイギリスイギリスグレアター マンチェスターヘイグで生まれた時，父Richard Le Wayteは36歳，母Alice de Nevilleは36歳であった。彼はAgnes Wigtonとの間に少なくとも5人の息子をもうけた。彼は1355年にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアコルンブルークで70歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Adam Wiatt(이)가 1285년 영국 잉글랜드 그리터 먼체스터 하이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Le Wayte(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Neville(은)는 36세였다. 그는 Agnes Wigton(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1355년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 코브룩에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adam Wiatt родился в 1285 г. в местности хеиг, гритир манчестир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard Le Wayte было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Neville, 36. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей от Agnes Wigton. Он умер в 1355 г. в местности колнбрук, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности еркшир, Англия.
